windows.embed_text_v2: finished gardenia rose scented candle in frosted grey glass jar and cream candle in metal tin, black wick centering clip, marble coaster, wood table, lit styled decor
windows.summary_v2: Finished-product b-roll showing a poured tin candle and a labelled frosted-glass jar candle, ending with the lit jar styled among decor.

seconds_v2.desc: Extreme close-up top-down of a freshly poured cream-white candle in a metal tin, a black curled wick-centering clip resting on the smooth wax surface.
Same tin candle, the black wick clip sits centered on the pale set wax; surface is smooth with faint specks.
Cut to a finished frosted-glass jar candle with a white wax top and trimmed black wick, label reading GARDENIA & ROSE, standing on a marble coaster on a wood table.
Same frosted glass jar candle, unlit, slight camera move showing the smooth white wax surface and centered wick.
Continued view of the unlit grey frosted jar candle on its marble tile, wood plank table and a wooden board behind it.
Closer angle on the same jar candle, white wax and black wick centered, condensation-free glass.
Wider styled shot: the grey jar candle now lit on a marble coaster, flanked by two small glass jars holding wax/tealights on a wooden board with green stems in a vase behind.
Same styled scene, the single jar candle lit and glowing, decor arranged on the light wood floor.
Holds on the lit jar candle in the styled flat-lay with the two small jars and greenery, finished-product presentation.
